race.comment: MOONSHINE RUN (2) finished second last start at the first run back from a spell over 1400m at Gatton, beaten 0.7 lengths. Fitter for that run. Placed to advantage and can feature in the finish. POWER PACK (4) was sent out favourite last time and scored by 1.3 lengths at this track. Boasts five wins here at his home circuit and is sure to be competitive. PINK VIXEN (9) was out of the money two runs back then just missed the frame last start over 1800m at Gold Coast, beaten 5.5 lengths into fourth. This doesn't look as hard so she can find the winners' list. POWER OF SUCCESS (11) is racing in top order and has to be included.
